'''大津神社'''（おおつじんじゃ）
*[[大津神社 (大分県大分市)]] *[[大津神社 (大阪府泉大津市)]] *[[大津神社 (大阪府羽曳野市)]] *[[大津神社 (大阪府東大阪市)]] *[[大津神社 (岡山県真庭市)]] *[[大津神社 (岐阜県飛騨市)]] *[[大津神社 (兵庫県西脇市)]]
*豊受大神宮末社の[[大津神社 (三重県伊勢市)]]
{{aimai}}

revision.comment: 曖昧さ回避は市町村名のみ
整理
revision.text:
'''大津神社'''（おおつじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。
*[[大津神社 (飛騨市)]] - 岐阜県飛騨市鎮座 *[[大津神社 (伊勢市)]] - 三重県伊勢市鎮座。[[豊受大神宮]]末社（[[伊勢神宮|神宮]]125社のうちの１社） *[[大津神社 (泉大津市)]] - 大阪府泉大津市鎮座 *[[大津神社 (羽曳野市)]] - 大阪府羽曳野市鎮座 *[[大津神社 (東大阪市)]] - 大阪府東大阪市鎮座 *[[大津神社 (西脇市)]] - 兵庫県西脇市鎮座 *[[大津神社 (真庭市)]] - 岡山県真庭市鎮座 *[[大津神社 (大分市)]] - 大分県大分市鎮座
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:おおつしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.text:
'''Ōtsu Shrine''' (大津神社) refers to several Shinto shrines in Japan:
* {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Hida)|ja|大津神社 (飛騨市)}} - Located in Hida City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Ise)|ja|大津神社 (伊勢市)}} - Located in Ise City, Mie Prefecture. A subsidiary shrine of {{ill|Tōyūke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮}}, part of the 125 shrines of the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Izumi Ōtsu)|ja|大津神社 (泉大津市)}} - Located in Izumi Ōtsu City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Habikino)|ja|大津神社 (羽曳野市)}} - Located in Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Higashi Ōsaka)|ja|大津神社 (東大阪市)}} - Located in Higashi Ōsaka City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|大津神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Maniwa)|ja|大津神社 (真庭市)}} - Located in Maniwa City, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Ōita)|ja|大津神社 (大分市)}} - Located in Ōita City, Ōita Prefecture.
{{disambiguation}} [[Category:Shrines with the same name]] [[ja:大津神社]]

revision.comment: 表記の統一。住所の重複の削除。町名の追加。
revision.text:
'''大津神社'''（おおつじんじゃ）は、[[神社]]。
== 主な大津神社 == *[[大津神社 (飛騨市)|大津神社]] – [[岐阜県]][[飛騨市]][[神岡町 (岐阜県)|神岡町]] *[[大津神社 (伊勢市)|大津神社]] – [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[豊川町 (伊勢市)|豊川町]] ： [[豊受大神宮]]末社（[[伊勢神宮|神宮]]125社のうちの1社） *[[大津神社 (泉大津市)|大津神社]] – [[大阪府]][[泉大津市]]若宮町 ： 泉大津えびす *[[大津神社 (羽曳野市)|大津神社]] – 大阪府[[羽曳野市]]高鷲 ： 旧村社 *[[大津神社 (東大阪市)|大津神社]] – 大阪府[[東大阪市]]水走 *[[大津神社 (西脇市)|大津神社]] – [[兵庫県]][[西脇市]]嶋 ： 旧郷社、津萬の厄神さん *[[大津神社 (真庭市)|大津神社]] – [[岡山県]][[真庭市]]余野下 *[[大津神社 (大分市)|大津神社]] – [[大分県]][[大分市]]口戸
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:おおつしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''大津神社'''（おおつじんじゃ）は、「大津」を社名に持つ[[神社]]。
== 主な大津神社 == *[[大津神社 (飛騨市)|大津神社]] – [[岐阜県]][[飛騨市]][[神岡町 (岐阜県)|神岡町]] *[[大津神社 (伊勢市)|大津神社]] – [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[豊川町 (伊勢市)|豊川町]] ： [[豊受大神宮]]末社（[[伊勢神宮|神宮]]125社のうちの1社） *[[大津神社 (泉大津市)|大津神社]] – [[大阪府]][[泉大津市]]若宮町 ： 泉大津えびす *[[大津神社 (羽曳野市)|大津神社]] – 大阪府[[羽曳野市]]高鷲 ： 旧村社 *[[大津神社 (東大阪市)|大津神社]] – 大阪府[[東大阪市]]水走 *[[大津神社 (西脇市)|大津神社]] – [[兵庫県]][[西脇市]]嶋 ： 旧郷社、津萬の厄神さん *[[大津神社 (真庭市)|大津神社]] – [[岡山県]][[真庭市]]余野下 *[[大津神社 (大分市)|大津神社]] – [[大分県]][[大分市]]口戸

revision.text:
'''Ōtsu Shrine''' (大津神社) refers to several Shinto shrines in Japan:
* {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Hida)|ja|大津神社 (飛騨市)}} - Located in Hida City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Ise)|ja|大津神社 (伊勢市)}} - Located in Ise City, Mie Prefecture. A subsidiary shrine of {{ill|Tōyūke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮}}, part of the 125 shrines of the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Izumi Ōtsu)|ja|大津神社 (泉大津市)}} - Located in Izumi Ōtsu City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Habikino)|ja|大津神社 (羽曳野市)}} - Located in Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Higashi Ōsaka)|ja|大津神社 (東大阪市)}} - Located in Higashi Ōsaka City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|大津神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Maniwa)|ja|大津神社 (真庭市)}} - Located in Maniwa City, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Ōita)|ja|大津神社 (大分市)}} - Located in Ōita City, Ōita Prefecture.

A subsidiary shrine of {{ill|Tōyūke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮}}, part of the 125 shrines of the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Izumi Ōtsu)|ja|大津神社 (泉大津市)}} - Located in Izumi Ōtsu City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Habikino)|ja|大津神社 (羽曳野市)}} - Located in Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Higashi Ōsaka)|ja|大津神社 (東大阪市)}} - Located in Higashi Ōsaka City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|大津神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Maniwa)|ja|大津神社 (真庭市)}} - Located in Maniwa City, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Ōita)|ja|大津神社 (大分市)}} - Located in Ōita City, Ōita Prefecture.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "category:" to "Category:"
revision.text:
'''Ōtsu Shrine''' (大津神社) refers to several Shinto shrines in Japan:
* {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Hida)|ja|大津神社 (飛騨市)}} - Located in Hida City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Ise)|ja|大津神社 (伊勢市)}} - Located in Ise City, Mie Prefecture. A subsidiary shrine of {{ill|Tōyūke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}}, part of the 125 shrines of the {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Izumi Ōtsu)|ja|大津神社 (泉大津市)}} - Located in Izumi Ōtsu City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Habikino)|ja|大津神社 (羽曳野市)}} - Located in Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Higashi Ōsaka)|ja|大津神社 (東大阪市)}} - Located in Higashi Ōsaka City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|大津神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Maniwa)|ja|大津神社 (真庭市)}} - Located in Maniwa City, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Ōita)|ja|大津神社 (大分市)}} - Located in Ōita City, Ōita Prefecture.

revision.text:
'''大津神社'''（おおつじんじゃ）は、｢大津」を社名に持つ[[神社]]。
== 主な大津神社 == *[[大津神社 (飛騨市)|大津神社]] – [[岐阜県]][[飛騨市]][[神岡町 (岐阜県)|神岡町]] *[[大津神社 (伊勢市)|大津神社]] – [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[豊川町 (伊勢市)|豊川町]] ： [[豊受大神宮]]末社（[[伊勢神宮|神宮]]125社のうちの1社） *[[大津神社 (泉大津市)|大津神社]] – [[大阪府]][[泉大津市]]若宮町 ： 泉大津えびす *[[大津神社 (羽曳野市)|大津神社]] – 大阪府[[羽曳野市]]高鷲 ： 旧村社 *[[大津神社 (東大阪市)|大津神社]] – 大阪府[[東大阪市]]水走 *[[大津神社 (西脇市)|大津神社]] – [[兵庫県]][[西脇市]]嶋 ： 旧郷社、津萬の厄神さん *[[大津神社 (真庭市)|大津神社]] – [[岡山県]][[真庭市]]余野下 *[[大津神社 (大分市)|大津神社]] – [[大分県]][[大分市]]口戸
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:おおつしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

* {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Hida)|ja|大津神社 (飛騨市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Hida)|qq=}} - Located in Hida City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Ise)|ja|大津神社 (伊勢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Ise)|qq=}} - Located in Ise City, Mie Prefecture. A subsidiary shrine of {{ill|Tōyūke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōyūke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, part of the 125 shrines of the [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]]. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Izumi Ōtsu)|ja|大津神社 (泉大津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Izumi Ōtsu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Izumi Ōtsu City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Habikino)|ja|大津神社 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Habikino)|qq=}} - Located in Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Higashi Ōsaka)|ja|大津神社 (東大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Higashi Ōsaka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Higashi Ōsaka City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|大津神社 (西脇市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Maniwa)|ja|大津神社 (真庭市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Maniwa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Maniwa City, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Ōita)|ja|大津神社 (大分市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Ōita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Ōita City, Ōita Prefecture.

A subsidiary shrine of {{ill|Tōyūke Daijingū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōyūke Daijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, part of the 125 shrines of the {{ill|Ise Shrine|en|Ise Shrine|WD=Q687168|lt=Ise Grand Shrine|1=Ise Grand Shrine}}. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Izumi Ōtsu)|ja|大津神社 (泉大津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Izumi Ōtsu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Izumi Ōtsu City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Habikino)|ja|大津神社 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Habikino)|qq=}} - Located in Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Higashi Ōsaka)|ja|大津神社 (東大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Higashi Ōsaka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Higashi Ōsaka City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|大津神社 (西脇市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Maniwa)|ja|大津神社 (真庭市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Maniwa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Maniwa City, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsu Shrine (Ōita)|ja|大津神社 (大分市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsu Shrine (Ōita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Ōita City, Ōita Prefecture.
